lever: Move accepted linear-segment scheduler bookkeeping out of the per-equation execution loop and decrement remaining once for the completed segment.

profile_backed_target.source: Fresh RCH Criterion baseline after commit 043d4b4b
profile_backed_target.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-backend-cpu-pass46-baseline cargo bench -p fj-backend-cpu --bench backend_baseline -- backend_scheduler_cutover/dependency_chain --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1
profile_backed_target.residual_hotspot: already-topological dependency chains still spend 118.20 us at length 512 and 225.98 us at length 1000

after.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-backend-cpu-pass46-after cargo bench -p fj-backend-cpu --bench backend_baseline -- backend_scheduler_cutover/dependency_chain --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

worker_variance_note: RCH exec did not expose a worker pin flag. The lever is kept despite cross-worker baseline/after because the 512 and 1000 deltas are both about 58-59%, far above expected worker noise, and all behavior gates passed.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Accepted segments still iterate jaxpr.equations[segment_start..segment_end] in source order and call evaluate_equation for each equation before inserting that equation's output.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Accepted linear segments have a single producer chain, max_ready_wave remains 1, and no ready-set sorting or parallel evaluation path is introduced.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No primitive evaluation or arithmetic order changes; floating-point behavior remains owned by evaluate_equation.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG primitive evaluation path changes.
isomorphism_proof.fallbacks: Segments with missing, out-of-order, branched, or non-env/non-previous inputs return false from the preflight and use the existing dependency-count scheduler.
isomorphism_proof.barriers: Barriers are split before execute_pure_segment; the fast path cannot cross a barrier segment boundary.
isomorphism_proof.duplicate_outputs: validate_scheduler_bindings still runs before scheduling, and single_output_var is still checked for every accepted equation during preflight.
isomorphism_proof.executed_flags: For accepted completed linear segments, executed flags are not observable after the caller advances next_pending to segment_end; remaining is decremented by the exact segment length once after successful ordered evaluation.

validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-backend-cpu-pass46-tests cargo test --release -p fj-backend-cpu dependency_scheduler -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-backend-cpu-pass46-check cargo check -p fj-backend-cpu --all-targets

RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-backend-cpu-pass46-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-backend-cpu --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0; critical 0; warning inventory unchanged in this pass

alien_primitives.application: Once a deterministic topological segment is accepted and evaluated in source order, per-node worklist marks can be elided from the hot execution loop; only segment-level progress accounting remains.
